normalized_title: Residential Design Codes Volume 1 - Practice Notes (April 2024)
scope_summary: Companion guidance to the Residential Design Codes Volume 1 (a Planning Code made under Part 3A of the Planning and Development Act 2005) addressing the most common technical queries in interpreting the R-Codes Vol. 1 Part B deemed-to-comply standards. It clarifies how setbacks, boundary walls, open space, fencing, parking, vehicular access, privacy, solar access and ancillary dwelling provisions are to be measured and applied, in question-and-answer format with diagrams. The Practice Notes do not form part of the R-Codes and apply state-wide wherever R-Codes Vol. 1 applies; they restate and interpret R-Codes standards rather than create new ones.

key_numeric_standards.topic: dwelling setback fronting a right-of-way as primary street
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: single house or grouped dwelling, R15 or higher coding

key_numeric_standards.topic: porch/verandah/balcony setback fronting a right-of-way
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: dwelling fronting right-of-way, R15 or higher

key_numeric_standards.topic: garage setback directly facing a right-of-way
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: garage facing right-of-way (or min 0.5 m behind dwelling alignment)

key_numeric_standards.topic: carport setback fronting a right-of-way
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: carport (half the garage setback)

key_numeric_standards.topic: manoeuvring depth allowing nil garage/carport setback to rear right-of-way
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: garage or carport where rear lot boundary abuts a right-of-way

key_numeric_standards.topic: patio/verandah treated as continuation of dwelling wall
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: patio, verandah or similar; nil boundary setback permitted if 10 m or less long and no more than 2.7 m high

key_numeric_standards.topic: minor projections (eaves, chimneys) into setback area
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: projections measured from the wall from which they protrude

key_numeric_standards.topic: boundary wall classification distance
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: any wall on or less than 600 mm from a site boundary (incl. common property/strata boundaries)

key_numeric_standards.topic: rear boundary setback where Table B column 7 shows '*/6'
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: rear boundary; 'other' side setback from Tables 2a/2b

key_numeric_standards.topic: garage width (including piers/supporting structures) as proportion of lot frontage
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: single storey dwellings (up to 60% for two-storey with upper floor/balcony over garage and visible entry)

key_numeric_standards.topic: front fence solid portion maximum height
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: street fences; portions above 1.2 m must be visually permeable

key_numeric_standards.topic: fence pillar limits
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: pillars within deemed-to-comply front fence profile

key_numeric_standards.topic: visually permeable fence gaps
key_numeric_standards.value: >=50 mm gaps over >=1/3 of surface area, or <50 mm gaps over >=1/2
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: front fencing above 1.2 m

key_numeric_standards.topic: maximum structure height within sight-line truncation
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: structures within 1.5 m of vehicle access point or street corner truncation

key_numeric_standards.topic: uncovered portion of outdoor living area
key_numeric_standards.value: two-thirds of minimum required OLA (e.g. 20 m2 uncovered for R20)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: outdoor living areas, single house and grouped dwellings

key_numeric_standards.topic: visitor parking bays for communal driveway developments
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: developments of 4 or more dwellings served by a communal driveway

key_numeric_standards.topic: driveway separation from street corner
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: driveway to street corner or point where carriageway begins to deviate (per AS 2890.1)

key_numeric_standards.topic: landscaping strip beside driveway in access leg
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: each side of driveway within common property access leg

key_numeric_standards.topic: dividing fence shadow exclusion height
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: shadow cast by dividing fences excluded from deemed-to-comply shadow calculations

key_numeric_standards.topic: maximum internal floor area, aged and dependent persons' dwellings
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: aged and dependent persons' dwellings

definitions: patio / verandah / pergola (R-Codes Appendix 1, distinctions explained)
permanent roof cover / non-permanent roof cover (explained in practice note)

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015 (Schedule 2, cl 61 and cl 67)
Development Assessment Panel Practice Notes: Making Good Planning Decisions

quality_flags: Mirrored/reversed text fragments from rotated diagram labels (e.g. 'erehw htgnel llaw latoT' = 'Total wall length where', 'elbaemrep yllausiv' = 'visually permeable') around lines 269-277 and 529-543
Cover page text interleaved from two-column layout (acknowledgment and publication details mixed)
13 referenced diagrams (DIAGRAM 1-13) not extracted; some interpretations depend on the diagrams
summary.json key_provisions headings are garbled ('140 William Street', '1 Table D?') due to tabular Q&A layout defeating heading detection
Q&A table layout causes question text in the left column to wrap awkwardly across lines, but content is readable and complete (16 pages)
